# serval_team_user (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "serval_team_user" "example_team_user" {
  role = "TEAM_USER_ROLE_UNSPECIFIED"
  team_id = "teamId"
  user_id = "userId"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role` (String) Available values: "TEAM_USER_ROLE_UNSPECIFIED", "TEAM_USER_ROLE_AGENT", "TEAM_USER_ROLE_MANAGER", "TEAM_USER_ROLE_BUILDER", "TEAM_USER_ROLE_VIEWER", "TEAM_USER_ROLE_CONTRIBUTOR".
- `team_id` (String)
- `user_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) A timestamp in RFC 3339 format (e.g., "2025-01-15T01:30:15Z").
- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the format {team_id}:{user_id}.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import serval_team_user.example '<id>'
```
